introSection: Magic Loop is a sit down steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Aventura Luna Park in Guatire, Miranda, Venezuela.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single tall vertical loop.

fullText:
Magic Loop is a sit down steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Aventura Luna Park in Guatire, Miranda, Venezuela.

The ride has a single tall vertical loop.
